## Checklist
- [ ] I have claimed this issue on Discord before raising this PR
- [ ] My branch follows the naming convention (`fix/issue-42`, `feat/issue-67`, etc.)
- [ ] My PR title follows the format (`fix: #42 short description`)
- [ ] My PR description includes `Closes #issue-number`
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have not modified files unrelated to this issue
- [ ] I have not copied code from another participant's PR
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
